zh.lifeSummary: 當John Folcard I於大約1360年出生在英國諾福爾可可洛斯特維其可時，他的父親Ralph Folcard26歲，母親Mrs. Ralph Folcard26歲。他於1387年之前與Alice Of Crostwick在英國諾福爾可可洛斯特維其可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1413年8月在英國英格蘭諾福爾可諾維其享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Folcard I于大约1360年出生在英国諾福爾可可洛斯特維其可时，他的父亲Ralph Folcard26岁，母亲Mrs. Ralph Folcard26岁。他于1387年之前与Alice Of Crostwick在英国諾福爾可可洛斯特維其可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1413年8月在英国英格兰諾福爾可諾維其享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Folcard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: French: relationship name French Foucquart, from the Old French personal name Foucard (Continental Germanic Fulchard). Compare Folkard .

variants.name: Folkard
meanings: 1 Norman, English: relationship name from the Middle English (Old French) personal name Folcard, Foucard, Focard (Continental Germanic Fulchard). Compare Fulcher , with which this name may sometimes have been confused. See also Flucker .
2 Norman, English: relationship name perhaps also partly from the Continental Germanic personal name Fulchered, which had some currency in E Anglia in the medieval period.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Folcard I was born about 1360, in Crostwick, Norfolk, England, his father, Ralph Folcard, was 26 and his mother, Mrs. Ralph Folcard, was 26. He married Alice Of Crostwick before 1387, in Crostwick, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died in August 1413, in Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Folcard I est né environ 1360, à Crostwick, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Folcard, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Ralph Folcard, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Alice Of Crostwick avant 1387, à Crostwick, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en août 1413, à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Folcard I um 1360 in Crostwick, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph Folcard 26 und seine Mutter Mrs. Ralph Folcard 26. Er hat vor 1387 in Crostwick, Norfolk, England Alice Of Crostwick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb im August 1413 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Folcard I è nato il circa 1360 nel Crostwick, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Ralph Folcard, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Ralph Folcard, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Alice Of Crostwick prima del 1387, nel Crostwick, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì nel agosto 1413, nel Norwich, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Folcard Iが約1360年にイギリスノーフォルククロストウィックで生まれた時，父Ralph Folcardは26歳，母Mrs. Ralph Folcardは26歳であった。1387年以前にイギリスノーフォルククロストウィックでAlice Of Crostwickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1413年8月にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクノーウィチで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Folcard I(이)가 대략 1360년 영국 노르폴크 크로스트윅에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Folcard(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Ralph Folcard(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1387년 이전 영국 노르폴크 크로스트윅에서 Alice Of Crostwick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1413년 8월 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 노위치에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Folcard I nasceu aproximadamente 1360, em Crostwick, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph Folcard, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Ralph Folcard, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Of Crostwick antes 1387, em Crostwick, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em agosto de 1413, em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Folcard I родился около 1360 г. в местности кроствикк, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph Folcard было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Ralph Folcard, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Of Crostwick перед 1387 г. в местности кроствикк, норфолк, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер август 1413 г. в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Folcard I nació aproximadamente 1360, en Crostwick, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph Folcard, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Mrs. Ralph Folcard, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Alice Of Crostwick antes de 1387, en Crostwick, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió en agosto de 1413, en Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 54 años.
